question: Provide a breakdown by state and urban/rural status showing the average household size and the total number of households recorded.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT), COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    g.STATE,
    g.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG,
    AVG(fc.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) AS average_household_size,
    COUNT(*) AS total_households
FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION fc
JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY g ON fc.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
GROUP BY g.STATE, g.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG
ORDER BY g.STATE, g.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    g.STATE,
    g.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG,
    AVG(fc.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) AS average_household_size,
    COUNT(*) AS total_households
FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION fc
JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY g ON fc.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
GROUP BY g.STATE, g.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG
ORDER BY g.STATE, g.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG;

SELECT 
    g.STATE,
    SUM(fhc.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) AS total_household_members,

FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY g

    g.DISTRICT,
    AVG(fhc.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT) AS average_household_size
FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION fhc
JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY g ON fhc.GEOGRAPHY_ID = g.GEOGRAPHY_ID
WHERE g.STATE ILIKE 'Uttar Pradesh'
    AND g.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG ILIKE 'Rural'
GROUP BY g.DISTRICT
ORDER BY average_household_size DESC
LIMIT 5;
